title: Nusantara State Language
description: Cognitive substrate layer for AAA state records, encoding Malay/Nusantara governance semantics: adat, maruah, sabar, amuk, silaturrahim, and fiqh obligation bands. Forged into the AAA control plane as a cultural intelligence substrate for agentic systems.

stage_band.description: Applies across all AAA pipeline stages where cultural reasoning is required.

nusantara_state.description: The cultural-cognitive layer superimposed on AAA state. Not decoration; it is a decision topology.

adat_phase.description: Agentic protocol phase. sabar = pause/hold; amuk = righteous boundary defense; seal = committed/irreversible; void = rejected/invalidated.

fiqh_band.description: Obligation classification under Nusantara jurisprudence mapped to AAA action authority.

maruah_signals.description: Dignity considerations that must remain intact for all stakeholders.

silaturrahim_refs.description: Relationship witnesses — parties whose trust continuity is affected by this state.

kampung_gadai_risk.description: Sovereignty-loss warning from Usman Awang's Melayu: are we celebrating while the village is pawned?

budi_reasoning.description: Cultivated reasoning: the explanation that bridges emotion (hati), ethics (budi), and evidence.

pantang_break.description: A broken taboo, only permitted when it blocks progress and is anchored to evidence.

linguistic_form.description: Human-readable sentence forms in Bahasa and English. The soul of the state record.

cultural_witnesses.description: Agents, organs, or human roles that attested the cultural reasoning.

evidence_refs.description: Canonical evidence references backing the state, as required by adat agentic.
